title: (Bullish Signal) DZSI enters Uptrend as Momentum ascends above 0 level on Mar 11, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that DZSI's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 88 similar cases where DZSI's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 71 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%. Current price $16.92 crossed the resistance line at $16.49 and is trading between $16.99 resistance and $16.49 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 02/08/21 - 03/11/21, the price experienced a -5% Downtrend, while the week of 03/04/21 - 03/11/21 shows a +7% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/7zbwm6nommm61.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=de26d026e58769a7ae8889693a914d7bfe6f55e9

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where DZSI's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, 13 of 18 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 51 of 62 cases where DZSI's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on DZSI as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 71 of 88 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

DZSI moved above its 50-day Moving Average on March 11, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

Following a +6.64% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where DZSI advanced for three days, in 227 of 279 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 157 of 197 cases where DZSI Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 80%.
